message:
feat: add message fingerprinting for session tracking

Implements SHA256-based fingerprinting for API messages with JSON
canonicalization to ensure consistent hashes regardless of whitespace
or key ordering. Includes functions to extract messages, prior
conversation state, and assistant responses from both Anthropic and
OpenAI API formats.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
